description: Hero opener with eyebrow label, large conclusion title, and supporting lead line on a crisp white corporate canvas.
authoringHints: Put the conclusion title in [data-role=hero-title]. Eyebrow context in [data-role=hero-eyebrow]. Subtitle or date in [data-role=hero-subtitle]. Optional accent blob is decorative only.

description: Four-card agenda grid with numbered sections and short descriptions.
authoringHints: Page title in [data-role=page-title]. Each card uses [data-role=agenda-item] with inner [data-role=agenda-number], [data-role=agenda-title], [data-role=agenda-desc]. Keep 4 items for best balance.

description: Left narrative column with eyebrow + bullets; right column Chart.js bar chart.
authoringHints: Title in [data-role=page-title]. Bullets in [data-role=body] as li elements. Chart renders in canvas[data-ppt-chart-canvas]. Update chart data in inline script.

description: Three large KPI stats in a horizontal row with labels and optional page heading.
authoringHints: Optional heading in [data-role=page-title]. Each stat block has [data-role=stat-value] and [data-role=stat-label]. Use tabular-nums for numbers.

description: Closing slide with headline, supporting bullets, and a pill-shaped CTA button.
authoringHints: Main message in [data-role=cta-title]. Bullet list in [data-role=cta-body]. Action label in [data-role=cta-action] (text only, styled as button).
